description_long: This is a rustic wooden cabin situated on a raised, grassy terrain with several mature pine trees surrounding it. The main structure features a gable roof with a corrugated metal section and a brick chimney, and the exterior is clad in weathered vertical wooden planks. There are multiple windows of varying sizes, some grouped together and others isolated, providing ample natural light. A prominent wooden staircase leads up to a deck that wraps around part of the cabin, connecting to a small outbuilding and a covered well. The property includes a parked off-road vehicle, a small shed, and a covered wood storage area, all integrated into the landscape. The overall scene evokes a secluded, self-sufficient homestead with functional outdoor spaces and a strong connection to nature.
description: A rustic wooden cabin with a gable roof, surrounded by pine trees, a deck, outbuildings, and a parked off-road vehicle on a grassy, elevated plot.
description_view_0: This view highlights the main cabin with its gable roof, the covered wood storage area, and the surrounding pine trees, as well as the terrain's elevation.
description_view_1: The rear and side of the cabin are visible, showing vertical wood siding, a small outbuilding, a well, and a deck extending from the main structure.
description_view_2: This angle emphasizes the wooden staircase leading to the deck, the off-road vehicle, and the integration of the cabin with large rocks and trees.
description_view_3: The front facade of the cabin is shown, featuring the main entrance, porch area, deck, and a clear view of the vehicle and small shed.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with a corrugated metal section and moderate overhangs, featuring a brick chimney
attribute_window_arrangement: Multiple windows of varying sizes, mostly rectangular, asymmetrically distributed with some grouped on the main facade and others isolated on the sides and rear
attribute_door_placement: One main entrance door on the front facade, a secondary door on the side near the deck, and additional doors on the outbuildings and shed
